clubSubscription.renewalRequired: Renewal Required: Sponsors are currently hidden. New admins/organizers cannot be added. Existing data is safe. Set a renewal date to restore sponsor visibility and allow admin additions.

clubSubscription.revokeTrialDescription: This club is on a 2-week trial while their invoice is pending. If you have not received payment before the trial expires, you can revoke their premium access here. Revoking will immediately reset the club to the free plan.
clubSubscription.revokeTrialSuccess: Trial access revoked. Club has been reset to the free plan.

auth.oauthUnavailable: Sign-in is temporarily unavailable because authentication is not configured. Please refresh or contact support.
auth.whatDoesSignInMean: What does sign in with Apple or Google mean?
auth.signInExplanation: Signing in with Apple or Google still gives you the option to use a different name and email with this app. You share no other information with this app than the email and name you enter this time.
auth.appleSupportLink: Manage your apps with Sign in with Apple - Apple Support
auth.appleSupportDescription: When you use Sign in with Apple, you can use your Apple Account to sign in to participating apps and websites from developers other than Apple. Learn how to view and manage the apps that you use with Sign in with Apple.
auth.googleAccountLink: Third Party Sign in with Google - Google Account
auth.googleAccountDescription: Third party login allows you to sign in with Google across multiple apps & sites. Stop password tracking & use your Google Account for a simpler sign in.

manageClub.premiumEnabled: This club has premium features enabled
manageClub.renewModalDescription: This will submit a renewal request to the super admin. Once approved, your premium features will be restored.
manageClub.renewModalInvoiceMessage: To activate premium, please make sure to pay the invoice for Premium that we will send to the same email you use for this account. The invoice is 100 EUR for one year of premium and shall be paid to {{companyName}} IBAN: {{iban}}. With a premium account you can display the club sponsors on your club site in TB10 and you can show sponsors for the tournaments you organise. We will send you the invoice in 2–3 days. To give you immediate access to premium, it is already activated for 2 weeks and will stay activated if you pay the invoice before that. If you should have trouble with this, please contact us.
manageClub.renewModalPriceSummary: 100 EUR / year · invoice sent within 2–3 days
manageClub.renewModalInvoiceDetail: We'll send an invoice for <amount>{{amount}}</amount> to the email on your account. Payment goes to <company>{{companyName}}</company> · IBAN <iban>{{iban}}</iban>.
manageClub.renewModalTrialCallout: Premium is already active for <duration>{{trialDuration}}</duration>. It stays active once the invoice is paid.
manageClub.renewModalSupportNote: Having trouble? <contactLink>Contact us</contactLink> and we'll help you get set up.
manageClub.expiryModalDescription: Set or extend the premium expiry date for this club. Quick access for fast updates without changing subscription plans.
manageClub.expiryTipBody: This is a quick update for expiry dates only. To change subscription plans or manage full billing details, use the Subscriptions tab in the navigation menu.
manageClub.upgradeBannerBenefits: Unlock the sponsors page and more premium features for your club.

about.title: About TB10
about.allowsYouToItem4: Schedule games according to player skill level
about.howToUseItem1: Sign in using Google or Apple ID
about.howToUseItem2: Find or add your club under "Clubs" in Settings
about.howToUseItem3: Add your club as "Home Club" (now tournaments can be filtered on distance from your home club)
about.howToUseItem4: You become administrator of clubs you add
about.howToUseItem5: Only the administrator can organise tournaments for your club
about.howToUseItem6: You can change or add administrators for your club by <link>contacting us</link>.
about.glicko2Paragraph: G3 is based on the Glicko-2<sup>1</sup> rating system for assessing a player's skill level. Glicko-2 is considered an improvement over the older Elo<sup>2</sup> rating system, widely used for Chess, primarily because it accounts for the reliability of a player's rating through displaying the standard deviation ±. Deviations in TB10 are shown at 95% confidence level. The G3 skill level calculation is tailored to converge even faster than the Glicko-2.
about.glicko2Credit1: Glicko-2 was developed by MARK E. GLICKMAN Senior Lecturer on Statistics at Harvard University
about.glicko2Credit2: Developed by <eloLink>Arpad Elo</eloLink>, a Hungarian-American physics professor.
